summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Kyrios Appreciation Page - All tests passed. Static appreciation page with samurai theme, dark gaming aesthetic, and all required sections working correctly.

Glass card hover effects working. Dark theme with amber-500/emerald-500 accents verified. Rajdhani font loaded correctly.
